nasb.text: Then it came about after these things, the cupbearer and the baker for the king of Egypt offended their lord, the king of Egypt.

esv.text: Some time after this, the cupbearer of the king of Egypt and his baker committed an offense against their lord the king of Egypt.

cnv.text: 這些事以後，埃及王的酒政和膳長，得罪了他們的主人埃及王。

ccb.text: 后来，埃及王的侍酒总管和膳食总管得罪了王，

csbs.text: 这些事以后，埃及王的司酒长和司膳长得罪了他们的主埃及王。
